creator: mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us
text:
Was it compiled with or without GTK support?  What version of the
makefile do you have?  (ident Makefile)

I just tried it with version 
	$Id: Makefile,v 1.8 1999/04/13 20:53:16 billf Exp $
of the makefile with and without GTK support and it worked fine
for me.

Michael
